title: Société Générale is the Latest Global Bank to join Broadridge's Distributed Ledger Repo Platform
text: NEW YORK , June 30, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Leveraging the latest technology to further transform its capital market operations, Société Générale, is now live on the distributed ledger technology repo platform (DLR) created by global Fintech leader, Broadridge Financial Solutions, Inc. (NYSE:BR). The blockchain-enabled platform accelerates the digitization of the global repo market, empowering participants to realize immediate benefits of reduced risk and operational costs and enhanced liquidity.

title: Here's Why You Should Retain Broadridge (BR) in Portfolio Now
text: Broadridge (BR) rides on strategic takeovers and a solid business model. However, balance-sheet weakness is a headwind.

title: Why Is Broadridge Financial (BR) Down 3.1% Since Last Earnings Report?
text: Broadridge Financial (BR) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock?
